narrative:
Mount Orab Village West (precinct in Brown County) has 784 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
